import os

from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route("/health")
def health():
    return jsonify({"status": "ok"})


if os.environ.get("FLASK_ENV") == "development":
    @app.route("/debug/config")
    def debug_config():
        return jsonify({"env": dict(os.environ), "cwd": os.getcwd()})

    @app.route("/debug/slow-query")
    def debug_slow_query():
        import time
        time.sleep(5)
        return jsonify({"done": True})


if os.environ.get("ADMIN_ENABLED", "").lower() == "true":
    @app.route("/admin/reset-cache")
    def admin_reset_cache():
        import importlib
        importlib.invalidate_caches()
        return jsonify({"cache": "cleared"})
